purchaseModal.replaceWarningDesc: By acquiring {{newName}}, your {{currentName}} membership will be replaced. Remaining days do not accumulate.
purchaseModal.membershipActive: Your membership is now active. Enjoy all the benefits.
purchaseModal.errorDefault: The transaction could not be completed
purchaseModal.timeoutMessage: The payment process took too long. If you completed the payment, your membership will be activated automatically in a few minutes. If not, you can try again.
purchaseModal.pendingDesc: Your payment is being verified by the bank.
purchaseModal.pendingNotice: Important: Your membership will be activated automatically when the payment is confirmed. This may take from a few minutes to a few hours depending on the payment method.

purchaseModal.declinedNotice: No charges were made to your account. You can try again with a different payment method or contact your bank.
purchaseModal.delayedDesc: Your payment was successfully charged, but there was an issue activating your membership. It will be activated automatically in a few moments.
purchaseModal.delayedNotice: Do not make another payment. Your money is safe and your membership will be activated shortly. If it doesn't activate in a few minutes, contact us via WhatsApp.

levelsModal.title: Membership System
levelsModal.description: Our membership system gives you access to exclusive benefits. The higher your level, the more benefits you can enjoy.
levelsModal.tip: Tip: Benefits with a membership badge require that minimum level to access them.

benefits.title: Benefits by Level
benefits.zanahoriDesc: The Zanahoria level is free and gives you basic access to public varieties.
benefits.zanahoriUpgrade: Level up to unlock exclusive benefits!

levelCard.upgradeDesc: Unlock exclusive discounts, Virtual Coins and more benefits.

hero.defaultSubtitle: Join our community and access exclusive benefits based on your membership level

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Resolve your questions about memberships
faq.q1: How does the membership system work?
faq.a1: Our membership system allows you to access exclusive benefits based on your level. Each level has different perks such as Virtual Coins, special discounts, access to exclusive varieties and more.
faq.a2: You can level up by purchasing a higher membership. Select the desired level and complete the payment process. Your new level will be activated immediately.
faq.a3: Virtual Coins are credits you receive based on your membership period. You can use them to redeem benefits in the club. Unused points accumulate.
faq.a4: Yes, you can cancel at any time. You will keep the benefits until the end of the paid period. After that, you will return to the basic level (Zanahoria).
faq.q5: What happens if my membership expires?
faq.a5: If your membership expires without renewal, you will return to the basic level. You will lose access to exclusive benefits, but you can renew whenever you want.
faq.a6: Yes. If you have a Gold membership, you enjoy all Bronze and Silver benefits, plus those exclusive to your level.
faq.notFound: Didn't find what you were looking for?
faq.teamReady: Our team is ready to help you
